Title: Successful User Registration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter valid user credentials.
3. Submit the registration form.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the homepage and marked as registered.

Title: Unsuccessful User Registration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter invalid user credentials (missing email).
3. Submit the registration form.
Expected Result: User is prompted to create a new user.

Title: Navigate to Homepage via Menu
Test Steps:
1. Click on the side menu.
2. Select 'Homepage'.
3. Confirm selection.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the homepage.

Title: Navigate to My Reports via Menu
Test Steps:
1. Click on the side menu.
2. Select 'Le mie segnalazioni'.
3. Confirm selection.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the 'My Reports' page.

Title: Navigate to Settings via Menu
Test Steps:
1. Click on the side menu.
2. Select 'Impostazioni'.
3. Confirm selection.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the settings page.

Title: Add Alert with Correct Fields
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Add Alert' in the side menu.
2. Fill in the first four fields correctly.
3. Click 'Add Category'.
4. Open category list.
5. Press the green button to submit the alert.
Expected Result: Alert is added successfully.

Title: Add Alert with Incorrect Fields
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Add Alert' in the side menu.
2. Fill in the first four fields incorrectly.
3. Click 'Add Category'.
4. Open category list.
5. Attempt to press the green button.
6. System prompts to correct the fields.
7. Correct the fields and press the green button.
Expected Result: Alert is added successfully after field corrections.

Title: View All Alerts
Test Steps:
1. Click 'View Alerts' in the side menu.
2. Display all alerts.
3. Click on a specific alert.
4. View detailed alert information.
Expected Result: User sees a list of all alerts and detailed information about a selected alert.

Title: Navigate to Dwelling Screen
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Profile' in the side menu.
2. Navigate to the profile page.
3. Click on the blue house icon.
4. Move to the dwellings screen.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the dwellings screen.

Title: Save Changes in Profile
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Profile' in the side menu.
2. Navigate to the profile page.
3. Click on the blue house icon.
4. Move to the dwellings screen.
5. Ensure all fields are correctly filled.
6. Save changes.
Expected Result: Changes are saved successfully.

Title: Discard Changes in Profile
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Profile' in the side menu.
2. Navigate to the profile page.
3. Click on the blue house icon.
4. Move to the dwellings screen.
5. Ensure all fields are correctly filled.
6. Discard changes.
Expected Result: Changes are discarded without saving.
